Webcore Solutions creates brand identity for businesses in Dubai and globally — from distinctive logos to editorial-grade brand systems that earn trust at first glance.

Our Creative Craft

Design that earns trust at first glance.

Every brand we build starts with strategy and ends with a system — not just a logo. We create visual identities that are distinctive, consistent and built to work everywhere your business shows up.

  • 100% IP ownership on delivery

    Every file, every mark, every asset belongs to you outright — no licensing fees or lock-in, ever

  • 3 distinct creative concepts per project

    We present three fully developed directions so you can choose the route that best fits your vision

  • Print-ready source files included

    Figma, .AI, .PSD, .EPS and print-optimised PDFs — every format you'll ever need, handed over on delivery

300+

Brand projects

3

Concepts per project

98%

Client satisfaction

Full IP transfer
Graphic Design
300+Brand identities
98%Satisfaction rate
100%IP owned by you
What We Design

Every design discipline,
under one roof.

From the first mark on a page to a fully codified brand system — we handle every visual discipline in-house.

Logo Design

Marks that are timeless, scalable and unmistakably yours — crafted to work at every size, in every context, for decades.

Brand Systems

Type, colour, voice and motion — codified and consistent across every touchpoint, from your website to your packaging.

Brochures & Collateral

Print-ready editorial pieces that position your brand at the premium end of the market and sell without saying a word.

Company Profiles

Editorial-grade capability documents built for high-stakes pitches, investor decks, and enterprise procurement processes.

Visiting Cards

Premium business cards designed with finish, weight and character — because a first impression should be impossible to forget.

Web & UI Design

Beautiful, conversion-focused interfaces in Figma — pixel-perfect, responsive, and handed off ready for development.

Deliverables

What you walk away with.

  • Logo suite — primary, monogram & all lockups
  • Full brand guidelines PDF (50+ pages)
  • Source files — Figma, .AI, .PSD, .EPS
  • Print-ready collateral (CMYK, bleed-ready)
  • Social media template kit
  • Web & favicon asset exports
Tools & Software

Our design toolset.

Industry-standard tools handled by senior designers — so your files are always compatible, portable and future-proof.

Figma
Adobe Illustrator
Photoshop
InDesign
After Effects
Procreate

100% IP transfer. Every file, every asset, every mark belongs to you on final delivery. No licensing, no subscriptions, no strings attached.

Our Process

From brief to brand —
five clear steps.

A structured creative process refined across 300+ brand projects.

01

Discovery

Brand questionnaire, goals, competitive audit.

02

Explore

Mood boards, visual directions, reference curation.

03

Create

Initial concepts presented across 3 directions.

04

Refine

Deep iteration on the chosen route with your team.

05

Deliver

Source files, brand guidelines, asset handoff.

Client Stories

What our clients say.

"Webcore Solutions took a brief that was all over the place and delivered a brand identity that felt completely right. Every team member said 'that's us' the first time they saw it."

Isabella Moreau

Brand Manager, Lune Hospitality

"The company profile Webcore produced for our investor meetings is genuinely impressive — it communicates credibility in a way our old materials never did."

Khalid Al-Farsi

Founder, Prestige Auto UAE

"The visual identity system Webcore designed has scaled across 40+ assets without losing consistency. The Figma file they delivered is the most organised brand library I've ever worked with."

Rachel Kim

Marketing Lead, Latitude Consulting
